title: Create GunItem class and register modularshoot:gun item

reference_files.reason: System 2: Gun system - gun item ID, GunData component, item properties
Core principles - max stack 1, fire resistant, no enchantment, offhand restriction

acceptance_criteria: GunItem class extends Item with max stack size 1 (overrides getMaxStackSize() to return 1)
GunItem is fire resistant (overrides isFireResistant() to return true, or sets appropriate Item.Properties)
GunItem cannot be enchanted (enchantability value 0 or override to prevent enchantment application)
GunItem registered as modularshoot:gun via DeferredRegister.Items in ModularShoot.ITEMS
GunItem has default GunData component attached (via component registration or item properties)
Item.Properties configured with appropriate flags (stacksTo(1), fireResistant(), etc.)
